007.description: Security audit, hardening, threat modeling (STRIDE/PASTA), OWASP checks, code review, incident response
use_cases: Audit API routes for OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities
Threat model for social features (feed, comments, user data)
Review Firebase auth implementation for security gaps
Hardening middleware (rate limiting, input validation)
Review Prisma queries for injection risks

api-security-best-practices.description: Secure API design patterns: authentication, authorization, input validation, rate limiting
use_cases: Review all /api/social/* routes for auth gaps
Implement rate limiting on AI Coach endpoint
Validate all user inputs (food entries, comments, posts)
Ensure ownership checks on delete operations
Secure Firebase Storage upload endpoints

api-design-principles.description: Master REST and GraphQL API design principles for scalable, maintainable APIs
use_cases: Design consistent response formats across all API routes
Plan pagination strategy for feed/comments
Design error response schema
Plan API versioning strategy
Document all endpoints with OpenAPI

api-endpoint-builder.description: Builds production-ready REST API endpoints with validation, error handling, authentication
use_cases: Build missing API routes (delete post, report content, block user)
Add proper error handling to existing routes
Add request validation to all POST/DELETE routes
Build auth middleware for protected routes

accesslint-audit.description: Find and fix WCAG 2.2 accessibility issues in codebase or live pages
use_cases: Audit all pages for WCAG 2.2 AA compliance
Fix missing ARIA labels on interactive elements
Ensure keyboard navigation works on all pages
Verify screen reader compatibility
Audit color contrast ratios

accessibility-compliance-accessibility-a.description: WCAG compliance, inclusive design, assistive technology compatibility
use_cases: Comprehensive accessibility audit of entire app
Design accessible workout session UI (screen reader friendly)
Ensure AnatomyMap is keyboard accessible
Verify focus management in modals/sheets

progressive-web-app.description: Build PWAs with offline support, installability, and caching strategies
use_cases: Configure service worker (sw.js) for offline workout logging
Implement cache-first strategy for exercise images
Add web app manifest for installability
Background sync for delayed data upload
Offline-first IndexedDB strategy review

cc-skill-frontend-patterns.description: Frontend development patterns for React, Next.js, state management, performance
use_cases: Review React component patterns (memoization, hooks usage)
Optimize re-renders in Zustand store subscriptions
Implement proper loading/error states
Review Next.js App Router patterns
Optimize bundle size (lazy loading, code splitting)

cc-skill-backend-patterns.description: Backend architecture patterns, API design, database optimization, server-side logic
use_cases: Review Prisma schema design and relations
Optimize database queries (N+1 problems)
Review middleware/proxy patterns
Design data migration strategy (guest → registered user)
Plan auto-save & resume workout architecture

i18n-localization.description: Internationalization and localization patterns, detecting hardcoded strings
use_cases: Audit hardcoded strings across all pages
Plan multi-language support strategy
Extract user-facing strings to translation files
Handle RTL layout for Arabic support

andrej-karpathy.description: Behavioral guidelines to reduce common LLM coding mistakes
use_cases: Reduce common coding mistakes in new features
Improve code review quality
Enforce clean code practices
Review for common React/Next.js anti-patterns
Fetch latest Next.js 16 docs when implementing features
Get Firebase Auth v6 migration guide
Check Prisma v6 breaking changes
Verify Tailwind CSS v4 syntax

baseline-ui.description: Validates animation durations, enforces typography scale, checks component accessibility
use_cases: Validate Framer Motion animation durations (accessibility)
Enforce consistent typography scale across pages
Check component spacing consistency
Verify touch target sizes (44px minimum)

antigravity-design-expert.description: Core UI/UX engineering skill for building highly interactive, spatial interfaces
use_cases: Design review of all Stitch-integrated pages
Optimize AnatomyMap 3D rotation UX
Review dark mode contrast and consistency
Improve mobile-first responsive layouts
